title: Customer Success Engineer, EMEA
location: Remote, Germany; Remote, Ireland; Remote, United Kingdom

tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Customer Success Engineer with 4+ years providing in-depth technical and architectural guidance to customers across cloud-native platforms. Skilled in GitLab, DevSecOps, Agile, Zoom, and Go, with strong communication and presentation strengths. Reduced production issue resolution time by 40% as a subject matter expert serving Fortune-media-scale enterprise customers.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Provided in-depth technical and architectural guidance to customers as subject matter expert, reducing production issue resolution time by 40%.
Architected scalable backend microservices in Go, Python, and Java Spring Boot, enabling independent deployments with less operational overhead.
Engineered high-throughput event-driven systems with Lambda and SNS/SQS, ensuring 99.99% reliability for Fortune-media-scale customers.
Led product enablement and training sessions over Zoom for 30+ members, improving onboarding speed and reducing repeat support requests by ~30%.
Built DevSecOps pipelines with GitLab CI/CD and Terraform, automating deployments to meet every single release SLA through Agile delivery activities.
Supported recruiting and talent acquisition by interviewing candidates and advising on compensation banding, accelerating engineering hires by ~25%.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Provided technical and architectural guidance and presentations to customers, translating complex concepts into clear, actionable steps with less ambiguity.
Delivered scalable RESTful APIs and microservices in Go, Python, Java Spring Boot, and Node.js as subject matter expert for backend integrations.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka, reducing service failures by 35% through enablement activities and process improvements.
Optimized SQL queries and Redis caching, improving API response times by 35% under heavy load across customer-facing services.
Containerized applications with Docker and Kubernetes and automated provisioning via Terraform on AWS, improving CI/CD deployment efficiency by 40%.
Contributed to recruiting through technical interviews and mentored new members, strengthening the talent acquisition process for the team.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular and Python/Java backend services through Agile activities, supporting internal customers and members.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and schemas across MySQL and MongoDB, improving query execution time by 20%.
Provided in-depth documentation and guidance on RESTful service contracts using Swagger/OpenAPI, building matter expertise and a repeatable process for the team.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit and Python automation, reducing defect rates with less rework across release cycles.
Delivered clear technical presentations and training to onboarding members, including veterans transitioning into tech, strengthening team communication.
Managed competing deadlines with strong time management, completing every assigned deliverable on schedule across concurrent Agile sprints.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Data Engineering
